Capabilities

What I bring

📱
Native Mobile UX

iOS & Android with full platform fluency — HIG, Material You, and the nuance between them. I design for the medium, not from the medium.

⚡
Interaction & Motion

Haptics, micro-animations, spring curves. The details that make something feel alive rather than functional — and how to ship them with engineering.

🔬
Research & Strategy

Jobs-to-be-done, heuristic analysis, usability testing. I translate ambiguous problems into clear design direction backed by evidence.

🧱
Design Systems

Scalable component libraries, token architecture, cross-platform consistency. Systems that encode team philosophy and maintain quality at speed.

🤖
AI-Augmented Design

Claude, generative prototyping, rapid ideation. I use AI to compress exploration cycles — not replace the thinking behind them.

🚀
Zero-to-One Product

MVP definition, concept validation, founding-team pace. I know what to cut, what to keep, and how to ship something that actually works.

Currently

What's on my mind

Craft

Why do so many apps feel identical in 2026? We have more tooling, more AI, more references — and yet fewer products feel genuinely alive. We've optimised for components and forgotten about choreography.

AI × Design

AI won't replace designers who understand why something feels right. It will replace those who can only explain what something looks like. The gap between taste and generation is the new design skill.

Mobile

The best mobile interactions are the ones you never consciously notice. A perfectly timed haptic, a spring curve that anticipates momentum — this is the craft layer most teams skip. It's where I live.

Systems

Design systems aren't documentation — they're decisions made in advance. The best ones encode the team's philosophy so deeply that any new screen feels inevitable.
